description_long: This is a large, detailed bungalow with a tan gabled roof and brown-and-white exterior walls, set within a spacious, landscaped yard. The front features a grand entrance with a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a paved driveway leading to the main door. The grounds include a rectangular swimming pool, a tennis court with orange markings, and several garden areas with trees and shrubs. The rear and side views reveal additional entrances, patios, and outdoor seating areas, as well as a fenced perimeter. The bungalow has multiple dormer windows and decorative rooflines, giving it a stately, classic appearance. The overall setting suggests a luxurious suburban or estate-style residence.
description: A large, classic bungalow with a tan gabled roof, brown-and-white walls, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a tennis court.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, central pool, and tennis court to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side entrance, and the arrangement of trees and garden features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the bungalow, back entrances, and the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the tennis court, pool, and side garden areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
